TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy_Drew_Barry, title = Drew_Barry, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Sakizaya]}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/wiki/Drew_Barry} }

S.FORM: nalecuh i Oakland, California ciniza. nanusyubay kanas-mali miunduay nu Amilika NBA nisakaput, pahanhanan tu kawaw ayza. Drew Barry i 1996 a mihcan NBA sapapili' mimaliay a kawaw, saka tusa ku uwac atu silsil lima a bataan izaw ku pitu(57), namapili' tu nu Seattle SuperSonics putiput. 2 bulad 17 demiad, 1973 a mihca, Drew Barry, miunduay.
S.PHON: nar~ɾəʦuħ i oakr~ɾand, ʦar~ɾifornia ʦiniza. nanusjubaj kanas-mar~ɾi miunduaj nu amir~ɾika nba nisakaput, paħanħanan tu kawaw ajza. drəw barrj i **** a miħʦan nba sapapir~ɾiʔ~ʡ mimar~ɾiaj a kawaw, saka tusa ku uwaʦ atu sir~ɾsir~ɾ r~ɾima a bataan izaw ku pitu(**), namapir~ɾiʔ~ʡ tu nu səattr~ɾə supərsoniʦs putiput. * bur~ɾad ** dəmiad, **** a miħʦa, drəw barrj, miunduaj.
S.FORM: nalecuh i Oakland, California ciniza. nanusyubay kanas-mali miunduay nu Amilika NBA nisakaput, pahanhanan tu kawaw ayza. Drew Barry i 1996 a mihcan NBA sapapili' mimaliay a kawaw, saka tusa ku uwac atu silsil lima a bataan izaw ku pitu(57), namapili' tu nu Seattle SuperSonics putiput. 2 bulad 17 demiad, 1973 a mihca, Drew Barry, miunduay.
S.PHON: nar~ɾəʦuħ i oakr~ɾand, ʦar~ɾifornia ʦiniza. nanusjubaj kanas-mar~ɾi miunduaj nu amir~ɾika nba nisakaput, paħanħanan tu kawaw ajza. drəw barrj i **** a miħʦan nba sapapir~ɾiʔ~ʡ mimar~ɾiaj a kawaw, saka tusa ku uwaʦ atu sir~ɾsir~ɾ r~ɾima a bataan izaw ku pitu(**), namapir~ɾiʔ~ʡ tu nu səattr~ɾə supərsoniʦs putiput. * bur~ɾad ** dəmiad, **** a miħʦa, drəw barrj, miunduaj.
